query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochrome portrait of a person with a short bob haircut against a solid black background. A bright rim of light traces the edges of their hair and shoulders, while their facial features are largely concealed in shadow. The subject wears a sleeveless top and faces slightly toward the camera.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome portrait employing deliberate underexposure that crushes the subject's face into near-total shadow, leaving only rim-lit edges of hair and shoulders visible against a pitch-black background. The extreme exposure obscures facial details and creates a mysterious, graphic effect.
